caption: A man with glasses and a tall, textured grey wig sits in a recording studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a wall filled with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and on the right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, and he begins to move his right arm and hand in a gesturing motion. The camera angle remains steady, capturing him from the chest up against the cluttered, gallery-like backdrop.
